PHASE:        LOCKED TASK QUEUE 2026-05-23 — COMPLETE (both sub-batches shipped).

              .cline/next-tasks.md deleted per queue completion gate. Next work selected by user.

              A.2 SOURCE CHANGES (4 NEW + 3 MODIFIED):
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/create-area-boundary-dialog.tsx NEW — Client Component. Full create form: name, region, aliases (CSV → string[] via parseAliases), source `<select>` (default "custom"), geometryType `<select>` (default "Polygon"), geometryGeojson `<textarea>` (raw paste with monospace + placeholder), arcgisReferenceId (optional → null if blank), isEnabled `Switch` (default true), overrideOfficial `Switch` (default false). Submit-time validation: trim+non-empty name + region; JSON.parse the geojson; validateGeoJsonShape() asserts Polygon → array-of-rings-of-[lng,lat] vs LineString → array-of-[lng,lat] (validates coordinates only — server stores full record). Mutation invalidates `areaBoundary.list` on success. Two success-state modes: form mode (validation error / server error inline) and success mode (single emerald confirmation paragraph + Close button with `data-testid="create-success-close"` for shadcn Dialog sr-only disambiguation).
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/edit-area-boundary-dialog.tsx NEW — Client Component. Pre-fills from initialBoundary prop (aliasesToString joins on ", "). Editable: name, region, aliases, arcgisReferenceId, isEnabled, overrideOfficial. Locked: source (disabled+readOnly Input), geometryType (disabled+readOnly Input), geometryGeojson (readOnly textarea with pretty-printed JSON, bg-muted). Computes diff against initial — submits ONLY changed fields (server-side updateAreaBoundarySchema is `.partial()`; updateMany skips undefineds via `Object.fromEntries(...filter)`). Blocks submit if patch is empty (UX-only — server would just no-op). Success copy distinguishes count===0 ("No matching boundary was updated — it may have been deleted") vs count>0 ("Updated — X rederive jobs enqueued"); template-literal number coerced with String(feedback.enqueued) to satisfy `@typescript-eslint/restrict-template-expressions`.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/area-boundary-table.tsx EDITED — added `onEdit: (boundary: AreaBoundaryRow) => void` prop; flipped Edit button from `disabled title="Available in A.2"` stub to `onClick={() => onEdit(b)}`. Delete button + filters + cursor pagination unchanged.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/page.tsx EDITED — replaced disabled Create stub with `setShowCreate(true)` button; added `editTarget: AreaBoundaryRow | null` state mirroring deleteTarget; mounts CreateAreaBoundaryDialog when showCreate + EditAreaBoundaryDialog when editTarget at root level (same pattern as A.1 DeleteAreaBoundaryDialog). Imports both new dialogs.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/area-boundary-table.test.tsx EDITED — onEdit prop added to all 16 renders; flipped "renders Actions column with Edit (disabled) + Delete buttons" assertion from `.disabled === true` to `.disabled === false`; added new test "calls onEdit with the row's boundary when Edit is clicked" (mirrors existing onDelete test). Net delta: +1 test case.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/create-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx NEW — 15 cases. Hoisted stubs mock `trpc.areaBoundary.create.useMutation` (nextOutcome switch for success/error mid-render) + `trpc.useUtils → list.invalidate`. Covers: all-fields rendering, defaults (source=custom, isEnabled=true, overrideOfficial=false), trim+null arcgis, comma-separated aliases → array (with trailing empty filter), invalid JSON rejection, Polygon shape rejection on flat coords, LineString shape rejection on nested coords, LineString happy path, blank-name + blank-region rejection, success + plural copy + invalidate + Close→onSuccess flow, singular copy when count===1, server error message render, Cancel→onOpenChange(false), pending-state disables both buttons, ArcGIS value preserved + trimmed.
              - apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/patrol-areas/__tests__/edit-area-boundary-dialog.test.tsx NEW — 14 cases. Hoisted stubs mock `trpc.areaBoundary.update.useMutation` + `trpc.useUtils → list.invalidate`. Covers: pre-fill of all editable fields from initialBoundary, locked-fields readOnly+disabled assertions (source, geometryType, geometryGeojson), blocks submit when no changes (validation error "No changes to save"), partial update with name only (payload === { id, name }), partial update with multiple fields (region + overrideOfficial — name/aliases excluded), aliases-as-array on aliases change, arcgisReferenceId=null when cleared to empty, blank-name rejection, success + invalidate + plural copy + Close→onSuccess, no-rows-updated copy when result.count===0, server error message render, Cancel→onOpenChange(false), pending-state disables both buttons.
